title: Unique Party 71992 - 23cm Disney Frozen Party Plates, Pack of 8 featuring Summer Olaf
features: 8 Disney Frozen Olaf Summer Dinner Plates
Feature a fun Olaf design with a beach background
Disposable tableware makes clean up a breeze
Coordinate with other Disney Frozen party supplies and Frozen decorations from Unique
description: Product Description Bring the goofy fun of Olaf to your Disney Frozen party with our Disney Frozen Olaf Summer Dinner Plates. These Olaf paper plates feature a fun Olaf design with a beach background. Paper tableware makes for quick party clean up, so you can spend more time with your family. Coordinate with other Disney Frozen decorations and accessories from Unique. Disney Frozen Olaf plates measure 23cm and are sold in packs of 8. Box Contains 8 Disney Frozen Olaf Summer Dinner Plates
